name: Okta
description: Monitor Okta identity management including user MFA enrollment, access controls, and group-based role assignments

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Okta Admin Console (https://YOUR_DOMAIN-admin.okta.com).
2. Go to Security > API > Tokens.
3. Click 'Create Token', give it a name (e.g. 'Comp AI'), and copy the token value.
4. Enter your Okta domain (e.g. company.okta.com) and the API token below.

credentialFields.label: Okta Domain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Okta organization domain, e.g. company.okta.com (without https://)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Okta Admin Console > Security > API > Tokens > Create Token. Requires Super Admin or Org Admin role.

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that active Okta users have MFA factors enrolled

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all Okta users and flags inactive or suspended accounts that should be removed

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Okta groups are configured for role-based access management
